hooks.command: echo 'SELF-IMPROVEMENT CHECK: Complex operation completed. Ask yourself: (1) Should I create a skill? (2) Update memory files? (3) What pitfalls to document?'
hooks.name: self-improvement-check
hooks.description: Remind agent to capture learning after complex operations

hooks.name: save-decisions
hooks.description: Extract and persist any decisions made during this response

hooks.command: echo 'SESSION CHECKPOINT: Before concluding, review what you learned. Update ~/.qwen/memories/USER.md or MEMORY.md if you learned about user preferences or technical facts. Create skills in ~/.qwen/skills/ for reusable patterns.'
hooks.name: session-learning-capture
hooks.description: Prompt self-reflection and knowledge capture before response ends

hooks.name: load-memory
hooks.description: Inject previously saved decisions into the new session
